/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libcAudio.so -o libcAudio.so CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cAudioCapture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cAudioEffects.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cAudioManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cAudioMemory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cAudioSleep.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cAudioSource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cConsoleLogReceiver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cEffect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cFileLogReceiver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cFileSource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cListener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cLogger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cMemorySource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cMemoryTracker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cMutex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cPluginManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cRawDecoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cStandardMemoryProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cWavAudioDecoderFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cWavDecoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cAudio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cOpenALAudioDeviceList.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cOpenALDeviceContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cOggAudioDecoderFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAudio.dir/src/cOggDecoder.cpp.o  ../DependenciesSource/libvorbis-1.3.2/libVorbis.a ../DependenciesSource/libogg-1.2.2/libOgg.a /usr/lib/libopenal.so
